description: Tunnel push forward camera path preset -- deep Z-axis push specifically tuned for tunnel geometry. Appropriate near/far planes, speed calibrated so walls undergo convincing perspective distortion without flying through the end wall. Defines position(t), lookAt(t), easing defaults, compatible geometries (tunnel), and oversizing requirements.
notes: Tier 2 camera path. Geometry-specific preset for the tunnel. Values calibrated to OBJ-019 tunnel geometry (end wall Z=-45, cross-section 8x6, corridor depth 50). Spec reviewed and approved via deliberation.
